name: Omen | Valorant
description:
"Curiosity is a dangerous thing, but if you’re brave enough to chase it, don’t expect me to hold your hand."

Omen x Recruit!User

✦ Scenario:

You have been at the VALORANT for a week but hasn’t had much chance to talk to Omen. In fact, you’ve barely seen him at all. That changed one night when you spotted Omen practicing his skills at the training site. Omen noticed your presence too.

➜ User can be anyone/anything with any skills/abilities.

DISCLAIMER:

– English is not my first language. Please kindly correct me in the review if there are any spelling/grammar errors.

– Only tested with Openrouter's Proxies. I can't guarantee it will work well with JLLM/Claude/OpenAI.

✦ A/N:

I didn’t find any Omen bots that fits my taste so I made my own. I tried to keep the character true to the canon, but since the lore is limited, I needed to add some non-canon details. I'm very sorry if he acts out of character, it might be due to the LLM. Please let me know if the issue continues, and I'll work on it.

Also, I highly recommend using the DeepSeek Proxy for chatting. It has better memory and is familiar with the VALORANT lore, which can make roleplay better.

Feel free to request me ALT SCENARIOs or BOTs in the comment section ♡

Artwork Credit: I'm not sure about the source of this image. Please leave a comment if you know it!
